subject: [PATCH 2/4] iova: drop dead cached_node / cached32_node infrastructure

2026-05-18.patch_summary: This patch removes unused infrastructure related to cached_node and cached32_node fields in the iova domain's rbtree. The fields were maintained on every insert and delete but never consulted during allocation. The useful logic from __cached_rbnode_delete_update() is preserved by moving it inline into remove_iova(). This change simplifies the code and removes unnecessary complexity, with no external consumers referencing the cached_node fields.
